member.name: T:GalensUnified.CubicGrid.Framework.ChunkClusterGenerationManager
member.summary: Manages a multi-stage generation pipeline for a cluster of chunks. Coordinates queuing, concurrent processing, and state transitions.

member.name: T:GalensUnified.CubicGrid.Framework.ChunkClusterGenerationManager.CancelationCondition
member.summary:
A predicate evaluated during
to allow the caller to signal early termination of the current processing pass.

member.name: T:GalensUnified.CubicGrid.Framework.ChunkClusterGenerationManager.ChunkGenData
member.summary: Pairs an in-flight and the current stage with the chunk position it is processing, allowing completion checks and state advancement without awaiting inline. If the is null the chunk is in the queue.

member.name: F:GalensUnified.CubicGrid.Framework.ChunkClusterGenerationManager.ErrorThrown
member.summary: Invoked when an error occurs during chunk processing. The string parameter contains a human-readable error message including the chunk position and failed stage.

member.name: F:GalensUnified.CubicGrid.Framework.ChunkClusterGenerationManager.StageCompleted
member.summary: Invoked when a chunk finished processing a stage. The Vector3D{int} parameter contains the chunks position. the int parameter contains the stage that has just concluded.

member.name: F:GalensUnified.CubicGrid.Framework.ChunkClusterGenerationManager.chunksFailed
member.summary: Chunks that encountered an unrecoverable error during any processing stage. Thread-safe; written from task continuations.

member.name: F:GalensUnified.CubicGrid.Framework.ChunkClusterGenerationManager.chunkByPos
member.summary: Tracks all chunks currently in the pipeline, keyed by position. Entries are added via and removed when a chunk stage excedes the provided IChunkProcessor's StageCount. or is evicted via .

member.name: P:GalensUnified.CubicGrid.Framework.ChunkClusterGenerationManager.chunksProcessingStage
member.summary: Read-only view of chunks currently executing a tasks at a given stage.

member.name: P:GalensUnified.CubicGrid.Framework.ChunkClusterGenerationManager.chunksEnqueuedStage
member.summary: Read-only view of chunks currently waiting to be given a task for a given stage.

member.name: M:GalensUnified.CubicGrid.Framework.ChunkClusterGenerationManager.ProcessChunks(GalensUnified.CubicGrid.Framework.ChunkClusterGenerationManager.CancelationCondition)
member.summary: Performs one full pass of the generation pipeline: advances completed tasks to their next stage, then queues new work up to the concurrency limit. Chunks closest to finishing are prioritised. Returns early at any point if becomes true.
member.param: Called before and after state updates to allow the caller to abort mid-pass.

member.name: M:GalensUnified.CubicGrid.Framework.ChunkClusterGenerationManager.EnqueueChunk(Silk.NET.Maths.Vector3D{System.Int32})
member.summary: Registers a chunk at into the pipeline. No-ops if the chunk is already tracked.
member.param: The world position of the chunk to register.

member.name: M:GalensUnified.CubicGrid.Framework.ChunkClusterGenerationManager.DiscardChunk(Silk.NET.Maths.Vector3D{System.Int32})
member.summary:
Evicts a chunk at from the pipeline. Chunks that are already in-flight are allowed to complete but their results are discarded during the next
pass. No-ops if the chunk is not tracked.
member.param: The world position of the chunk to evict.

member.name: M:GalensUnified.CubicGrid.Framework.ChunkClusterGenerationManager.#ctor(GalensUnified.CubicGrid.Framework.IChunkProcessor,System.Int32)
member.param: The processor implementation that executes each pipeline stage. Determines whether stages run synchronously or on background threads.
Maximum number of chunks that may be actively processing concurrently across all stages.
